title: epipactis longibracteata
intro: Epipactis longibracteata, also known as the spotted helleborine, is an orchid native to East Asia, characterized by its unique, spotted flowers and long bracts. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Epipactis longibracteata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used as a tea, tincture, or infusion, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
